title: Every Time Period Automation

posts.author: baruchm (Baruch Moroz)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi,
I would like to point on the following missing capabilities in the above automation.

At its first criteria, existing Every Time Period automation can be set to run on daily, weekly or monthly basis but cannot be set to run every x hours.
Adding to that, the option of adding a ‘And Only If’ condition is not available.

Then, at the **Then do this ** action part, there is no option to check if a column is something (for example: status, column is empty, date,…).

And lastly, the Notify action does not have the option of notifying the item creator.

I will be happy to hear on other workaround that I might have missed to consider or stand correct if I’m wrong.

Thanks,
Baruch
